title: gentianella tenella
intro: Gentianella tenella, also known as Least Balm or Small Balm, is a species of flowering plant in the gentian family, Gentianaceae. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Gentianella tenella include its ability to soothe digestive issues and alleviate symptoms of anxiety and insomnia. Gentianella tenella can be prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or infused oil, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
